さっさと資源を回収して<br>基地に帰還するとするか:
Let's quickly collect the resources
and head back to base.
周囲の草木がみるみる<br>枯れていく……:
The plants and trees around us
are withering before our eyes...
なっ！？ たった一晩で<br>小国を１つ滅亡させたという……:
What!? The one said to have destroyed
an entire small nation in a single night...
ど、どうやって戦うのよ！<br>こんな化け物と……:
H-how are we supposed to fight this thing!?
A monstrosity like this...
はぁ……はぁ……<br>早く、司令官に報告せねば……:
*Pant*... *pant*...
I must report to the Commander quickly...
いったい何が起きたんだ？<br>他の探索隊の連中は！？:
What in the world happened?
What about the rest of the scouting party!?
厄災は現在、<br>前線基地に接近中です！:
The Calamity is currently
approaching the frontline base!
アリシア！ 基地に戻るぞ！<br>迎撃準備だ！ 急げ！:
Alicia! We're heading back to base!
Prepare to intercept! Move!
